untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise identification of 'failure test' pattern (brief excursion beyond breakout level followed by immediate reversal with close back inside level within N bars). This requires pattern recognition logic not expressible with simple indicator comparisons. Thresholds for 'max_bars_outside_level', reversal confirmation strength, and specific breakout level identification are not defined in source material and cannot be quantified with allowed indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses volume confirmation and prior bar reversals, but core failure test pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond allowed operators. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders in original signal indicate parameters were not specified by the author.
